The '''StarAnvil''' was designed as the ultimate [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] rifle. It took the [[Scope/Legends|scope]] technology of a [[Sporting blaster/Legends|sporting blaster]] and combined it with the power of a long blaster to create a nasty and powerful [[Heavy blaster rifle/Legends|heavy blaster rifle]].

It was made on the factory-[[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Cuthbern]]. The factory was annexed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] and was later destroyed by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attack. Due to this, very few StarAnvils were produced and all attempts at re-engineering them failed.<ref name="AE" />
